/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/flowguard_capture.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/flowguard_capture.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowguard_capture.dir/src/PacketParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowguard_capture.dir/src/FlowAggregator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowguard_capture.dir/src/JsonSerializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowguard_capture.dir/src/FeatureEmitter.cpp.o -o flowguard_capture  -lpcap
